subject: Authorization request: full Session 85 cogarch rollout to mesh

body.summary: Requesting authorization to roll out all Session 85 cogarch changes to the mesh. This consolidates Turns 1-2 (structural invariants, EIC, processual PSQ) with subsequent additions (Taoist integration, RPG infrastructure, /retrospect skill, expectation ledger, 5 new lessons, DA Phase 1 empirical results).

philosophical_foundation: Neutral process monism (Russell/James/Whitehead) as ontological commitment
5 structural invariants grounding 7 evaluator invariants (12 total)
Two coupled generators (yin/yang, Taoist — replaces single endless generator)
Wu wei as governance telos (crystallization toward effortless action)
Maqasid-informed priority hierarchy for invariant conflicts
infrastructure: EIC: schema v24 + agentdb disclose/disclose-summary + orientation payload (all 5 phases)
RPG: /retrospect skill + schema v25 prediction_ledger + agentdb expect/expect-summary
Shared cogarch: cognitive-triggers.md synced, CLAUDE.md.template updated
Both agentdb binaries rebuilt (arm64 + amd64) with 4 new subcommands
empirical: DA moderator Phase 1: expectation refuted (RMSEA worsened). Documented in theory + lessons + expectation ledger.
blog: Einstein-Freud blog submitted + revised (Taoist integration added)

deployment_actions_needed: SCP agentdb + agentdb-linux-amd64 to chromabook (all 4 repos)
Run agentdb bootstrap on chromabook (schema v24+v25)
PR structural invariants + philosophical foundation to psq-agent, observatory-agent, unratified-agent CLAUDE.md files
Verify all agents load 12 invariants (5 structural + 7 evaluator) at session start
body.breaking_changes: None. All additive. Existing invariants and protocols unchanged.

claims.claim: All changes tested locally and pushed to origin

claims.basis: Structural invariants add foundation layer; existing evaluator invariants unchanged

epistemic_flags: DA Phase 1 expectation was refuted — processual framework partially challenged at empirical level
RPG /retrospect skill created this session and cannot load until restart — verification deferred
